---
title: "M1ke H0uk"
image: media/_TS73627.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/michael-houk-94704b274
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/m1keh0uk
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:mhouk26@students.claremontmckenna.edu
---
  <!-- Website for help:https://ucsb-meds.github.io/creating-quarto-websites/ -->

This is the website of Michael Houk. Here is a list of some of my key dentities and qualities, though it is by no means exhaustive: Brother, Curious, Student, Friend, Athlete, Awake, Myself?, Thinker, Attached.

I study economics and engineering. I play football. I like hard work.
